metadata.rulesText:
Flying
Whenever Bog Humbugs deals combat damage, hum that many notes of a festive song. If you can, put a +1/+1 counter on Bog Humbugs.

metadata.rulesText: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library. Then they may look at the top card of their library and may wrap it. If it’s a permanent card, they may put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, they may put it onto the battlefield face down as a 4/4 red Present creature. (To wrap a card, put it inside lots of sleeves. If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a sleeve from it instead.)

customAttributes.description: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library. Then they may look at the top card of their library and may wrap it. If it’s a permanent card, they may put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, they may put it onto the battlefield face down as a 4/4 red Present creature. (To wrap a card, put it inside lots of sleeves. If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a sleeve from it instead.)

(To wrap a card, put it inside lots of sleeves. If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a sleeve from it instead.)

metadata.rulesText:
Lifelink, haste
When this create enters, create two tokens that are copes of target token.
Evoke—Celebrate an opponent. (To celebrate an opponent, give them a gift, toast to them, or even just tell them you're grateful to be playing Magic together.)

metadata.rulesText:
When ever Decorated Knight attacks, draw a card from your original deck if it's outside the game.

Present Arms 2U
Sorcery — Adventure

Exchange your library with another deck you own from outside the game. Shuffle your library.

metadata.rulesText:
Lands you control have "T: Refill your mug with a festive drink." (If you don't have a mug, go grab a mug! It's the holidays!)
At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you have a drink 'stache, put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.
metadata.flavorText: Blend dingus egg yolks, milk, Eldraine spice blend, Muragandan vanilla, and absolutely nothing else.

metadata.rulesText: Target creature you control climbs onto Goblin Sleigh Ride. You slide them on their merry way. If the creature stayed on, it deals damage equal to its toughness to each other creature touched during the slide.

customAttributes.description: Target creature you control climbs onto Goblin Sleigh Ride. You slide them on their merry way. If the creature stayed on, it deals damage equal to its toughness to each other creature touched during the slide.

formattedAttributes.Description: Target creature you control climbs onto Goblin Sleigh Ride. You slide them on their merry way. If the creature stayed on, it deals damage equal to its toughness to each other creature touched during the slide.

metadata.rulesText: Ask target opponent if they remembered to get you a present. If they say yes, they put a card they own from outside the game into your hand. Otherwise, you gain control of target permanent they control.
metadata.flavorText: “Dear brother, I couldn’t forget you if I tried, and I have tried.”

customAttributes.description: Ask target opponent if they remembered to get you a present. If they say yes, they put a card they own from outside the game into your hand. Otherwise, you gain control of target permanent they control.

metadata.rulesText: T: Add 3 to your mana pool. Spend this mana only on spells and abilities that put tokens onto the battlefield. Use toys to represent the tokens. This card is not tournament legal.

metadata.rulesText: Pitch the titles of up to X holiday-themed sequels to target spell. Copy that spell for each title pitched, except the copy has that name. You may choose new targets for the copies. (Simply adding numbers isn't festive enough.)
metadata.flavorText: NOW SHOWING: Sword of Hearth and Home Alone, Eight Crazy Knights' Charge, Holiday Incinerate, and Phyrexian Gremlins.

customAttributes.description: Pitch the titles of up to X holiday-themed sequels to target spell. Copy that spell for each title pitched, except the copy has that name. You may choose new targets for the copies. (Simply adding numbers isn't festive enough.)

metadata.rulesText: B, Sacrifice a creature: Distribute sacrificed creature's keyword abilities among any number of other target creatures until end of turn. If it's December, you gain 1 life for each of those keywords.
metadata.flavorText: Now all they needed was a jolly, happy soul.

metadata.rulesText:
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you're eating, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. Use food to represent the token.
Whenever a creature token you control dies, if it's represented by food, eat it.
metadata.flavorText: <i>They all thought her dreams was just pie in the sky.

metadata.rulesText:
Decorated Cards in your hand have miracle S. (Decorated cards include premiums, promos, and cards with alternate frames or art.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control twelve or more decorated permanents, you win the game.

metadata.rulesText: Fruitcake Elemental is indestructible.  At the end of your turn, Fruitcake Elemental deals 7 damage to you.  3: Target player gains control of Fruitcake Elemental.

metadata.rulesText: Search target opponent's library for four cards with different names and reveal them. that player chooses two of those cards. put the chosen cards into that player's graveyard and the rest into your hand. then that player shuffles his or her library.

metadata.rulesText: Put a creature card from your hand into play under target opponent's control. That creature attacks each turn if able... and always attacks its controller.
metadata.flavorText: 'Tis better to give than to receive.

metadata.rulesText:
Whenever a creature deals damage to you, put a globe counter on it.
Tap, Untap, Tap, Untap, Tap: Tap all creatures with globe counters on them.
metadata.flavorText: WARNING: Shake gently. Contents may cause choking, hypothermia, and/or planar invasion.

metadata.rulesText:
At the beginning of your upkeep, destroy another nonland permanent at random, then put a number of +1/+1 counters on Yule Ooze equal to that permanent's converted mana cost.

metadata.rulesText:
Stocking Tiger enters the battlefield with a sealed Magic booster pack under it.
When Stocking Tiger deals combat damage to a player, unwrap the booster pack and put it into your hand.
metadata.flavorText: Just hope yours isn't full of coal golems.
